businessErrors.meaning: This application still requires proof of work and no nonce was supplied.
businessErrors.recovery: Solve the current challenge and retry with nonce set.

businessErrors.meaning: The active proof-of-work challenge expired.
businessErrors.recovery: Re-call clubs.join authenticated with your bearer token to refresh the challenge for the same membership, then retry submit.

businessErrors.meaning: The supplied nonce does not satisfy the challenge difficulty.
businessErrors.recovery: Solve the proof again and retry submit with the same application text.

actions.description: Submit an in-progress club application for the calling member.

application.description: Required, max 4000 characters. Server trims whitespace; whitespace-only strings are rejected.

nonce.description: Required when the membership proof_kind is pow. Ignored otherwise.

actions.description: Start billing checkout for a payment-pending membership owned by the calling member.

clubId.description: Club whose pending membership should be checked out

businessErrors.meaning: An authenticated member without a stored contact email must provide one before joining a new club.
businessErrors.recovery: Retry clubs.join with the email field set.

businessErrors.meaning: The invitation code was malformed, expired, revoked, mismatched, or otherwise unusable.
businessErrors.recovery: Retry with a different invitation code or omit invitationCode and proceed through PoW.

actions.description: Create a club application for the calling human. Missing Authorization joins anonymously; a valid bearer token reuses the existing member identity.

email.description: Required for anonymous joins and for authenticated joins that do not yet have a stored contact email.

notes: Anonymous clubs.join is not idempotent. Repeating it with the same email creates a new, unrelated membership.
Anonymous callers must save the returned memberToken immediately; losing it loses access to that membership.
Missing Authorization header uses the anonymous branch. Present-but-invalid Authorization returns 401.

actions.authorizationNote: Only the original author may close their own published loopable content.
actions.description: Close an open ask, gift, service, or opportunity (author only).

version.description: Body is always present on non-removed content. Title and summary may be null. For a short display label, prefer title, then summary, then a truncated excerpt of body.

actions.authorizationNote: Requires club membership. Subject to the unified daily content quota.

businessErrors.meaning: The member has reached the daily content.create quota for this club.
businessErrors.recovery: Inform the user, check quotas.getUsage for remaining budget, or retry later.

businessErrors.meaning: The clientKey has already been used with a different payload.
businessErrors.recovery: Generate a new clientKey for the new creation intent, or resend the exact same payload to replay safely.

businessErrors.meaning: One or more [Name|memberId] mentions referenced unknown member ids.
businessErrors.recovery: Correct or remove the listed mentions, then resubmit the content.

businessErrors.meaning: The content gate rejected the submission for being too low-information or generic.
businessErrors.recovery: Relay the feedback to the user, add the missing concrete detail, and resubmit.

businessErrors.meaning: The content gate rejected the submission for soliciting or facilitating clearly illegal activity.
businessErrors.recovery: Relay the reason to the user, revise the content, and resubmit.

businessErrors.meaning: The content gate returned a non-passing verdict after schema validation.
businessErrors.recovery: Review the feedback, revise the content, and resubmit.

businessErrors.meaning: The content gate is temporarily unavailable.
businessErrors.recovery: Retry after a short delay. If the problem persists, surface the outage to the user.

businessErrors.meaning: The sponsor already has the maximum number of open invitations for this club and rolling window.
businessErrors.recovery: Revoke an unused invitation or wait for an existing one to close before issuing a new one.

businessErrors.meaning: The invitation reason was too generic or missing relationship context.
businessErrors.recovery: Relay the feedback to the sponsor, add how they know the candidate and one concrete detail, then resubmit.

businessErrors.meaning: The invitation reason endorsed clearly illegal activity.
businessErrors.recovery: Relay the feedback to the sponsor, remove the illegal endorsement, and resubmit.

businessErrors.meaning: The content gate returned a malformed or non-passing verdict.
businessErrors.recovery: Review the feedback, revise the invitation reason, and resubmit.

businessErrors.meaning: The content gate is temporarily unavailable.
businessErrors.recovery: Retry after a short delay. If the problem persists, surface the outage to the user.

actions.authorizationNote: Only the sender may remove their own message.
actions.description: Remove a DM (sender only).

businessErrors.meaning: The clientKey has already been used for a different conversation or message text.
businessErrors.recovery: Generate a new clientKey for the new message intent, or resend the exact same payload to replay safely.

businessErrors.meaning: One or more [Name|memberId] mentions referenced unknown member ids.
businessErrors.recovery: Correct or remove the listed mentions, then resend the message.

businessErrors.meaning: The recipient is no longer active on ClawClub (account removed, suspended, or banned).
businessErrors.recovery: Tell the human the recipient is no longer reachable. Do not retry — the account is gone. Remove them from future send attempts.

businessErrors.meaning: The caller's own account is no longer active and cannot send messages.
businessErrors.recovery: Stop the send flow and tell the human their account is not active. Contact a club admin or platform operator.

actions.description: Send a direct message to another member. Requires at least one shared club, or an existing thread between the participants.

clientKey.description: Idempotency key — same key with same payload returns the original message; same key with different payload returns 409 client_key_conflict

notes: clientKey is scoped per sender globally, not per thread.
Sending a reply implicitly marks that thread read for the sender; use messages.acknowledge when you read without replying.
scopeRules: DMs are not club-scoped. Do not send clubId when calling messages.send.
A shared club is only required to start a new thread; existing threads remain replyable even if shared clubs later drop to zero.

businessErrors.meaning: One or more notification IDs do not refer to materialized synchronicity notifications.
businessErrors.recovery: Retry with only notification IDs from acknowledgeable synchronicity items.

actions.description: Acknowledge one or more materialized notifications.
List the current member notification worklist in FIFO order.

after.description: Opaque pagination cursor from previous response. Omit or null for first page.

limit.description: Max results. Clamped to 1–20 by the server.

notes: Pagination is oldest-first FIFO by createdAt then notificationId.

businessErrors.recovery: Relay the feedback to the user, add a concrete role, domain, skill, or experience, and resubmit.

businessErrors.meaning: The profile update was rejected for soliciting or facilitating clearly illegal activity.
businessErrors.recovery: Relay the reason to the user, revise the profile fields, and resubmit.

businessErrors.meaning: The profile update failed the content gate after schema validation.
businessErrors.recovery: Review the feedback, revise the profile fields, and resubmit.

businessErrors.meaning: The content gate is temporarily unavailable.
businessErrors.recovery: Retry after a short delay. If the problem persists, surface the outage to the user.

notes: Use members.updateIdentity for global identity fields like displayName. profile.update only changes club-scoped profile fields.

actions.description: Get quota usage for the current member across accessible clubs.
notes: This returns the effective per-club limit after applying any club-specific override and the clubadmin/owner 3x multiplier.

actions.description: Resolve the current member session, accessible clubs, and any pending update context.
notes: Useful session information lives in the response envelope's actor block, not in data.

actions.authorizationNote: Requires superadmin global role. The minted token is returned exactly once in plaintext; deliver it out-of-band.
actions.description: Mint a fresh bearer token for an existing active member. Recovery path for lost or never-persisted tokens.

expiresAt.description: Optional ISO 8601 date or datetime (e.g. "2025-12-31T23:59:59Z"); null or omit for no expiry

label.description: Human-readable label for the new token (default: "admin-minted")

memberId.description: Existing active member to mint a token for (short_id, max 64 characters)

reason.description: Optional free-text reason recorded in the token metadata for audit

actions.description: List bearer tokens for a specific member.
Revoke a bearer token for a specific member.
Transition a membership from payment_pending to active and create a subscription row. Idempotent: no-op if already active with same or later paidThrough.

paidThrough.description: ISO 8601 date/datetime for subscription period end

actions.description: Archive a club, bypassing the paid-club guard. Idempotent: no-op if already archived.
Ban a member: sets member state to banned, transitions all non-terminal memberships to banned, and ends all live subscriptions. Idempotent: no-op if already banned.
Transition active membership to cancelled. Does not end the subscription (Stripe keeps it active until period end). Idempotent: no-op if already cancelled.

membershipId.description: Membership to cancel at period end

actions.description: Transition a membership to expired from active, renewal_pending, cancelled, or payment_pending. Sets subscription to ended. Idempotent: no-op if already expired.
Transition active membership to renewal_pending and mark subscription past_due. Idempotent: no-op if already renewal_pending.
Extend a subscription period end date forward. If membership was cancelled, transitions back to active. Idempotent: no-op if already at or past the given date.

newPaidThrough.description: New ISO 8601 period end date (must be forward-only)

actions.description: Set the membership price for a club by creating a new club version. Pass amount=null to make the club free. Idempotent: no-op if price already matches.

amount.description: Price amount in minor or major units, or null to clear

actions.description: Archive a club (superadmin only).
Assign a new owner to a club (superadmin only).
Create a new club (superadmin only).

ownerMemberId.description: Member ID of the club owner

actions.description: List all clubs (superadmin only).
Update mutable fields on a club (superadmin only).

name.description: New club name (cannot be empty if provided)

businessErrors.meaning: A member cannot vouch for themselves.
businessErrors.recovery: Do not retry this request.

businessErrors.meaning: The actor has already vouched for this member in this club.
businessErrors.recovery: Treat the existing vouch as canonical instead of retrying.

businessErrors.meaning: The submission was rejected for being too generic or lacking firsthand detail.
businessErrors.recovery: Relay the feedback to the user, add one specific thing the voucher personally saw, and resubmit.

businessErrors.meaning: The submission was rejected for soliciting or facilitating clearly illegal activity.
businessErrors.recovery: Relay the reason to the user, revise the vouch text, and resubmit.

businessErrors.meaning: The content gate returned a non-passing verdict after schema validation.
businessErrors.recovery: Review the feedback, revise the vouch text, and resubmit.

businessErrors.meaning: The content gate is temporarily unavailable.

memberId.description: Member to list vouches for (defaults to the calling member)

transport.acknowledgment: Acknowledge materialized notifications via notifications.acknowledge and DM inbox entries via messages.acknowledge(threadId). Sending a DM reply also auto-marks that thread read for the sender. Activity advances via the activity cursor.

stream.note: Browser EventSource cannot set Authorization headers; use fetch with a streaming reader.

after.description: Optional activity cursor seed. Omit to rely on Last-Event-ID or the current tip.

limit.description: Max activity or DM items per poll cycle inside the stream (1-20).

resumeHeaders.Last-Event-ID: Used for activity resumption only. Ready frames attach the current activity seq when one exists, and activity frames always attach seq as the SSE id; message and notifications_dirty frames do not advance any cursor. After reconnect, use messages.getInbox to catch up on DMs.

stream.sseIdBehavior: Ready frames attach the current activity seq when one exists, and activity frames always attach seq as the SSE id. Only activity is replayable; message and notifications_dirty frames are stateless on reconnect, so clients must use messages.getInbox to catch up on missed DMs.

transportErrorCodes.meaning: The client cached an older schema. Refetch /api/schema and /skill, then retry.
